prompt: something broke when i ran @explorer to search my codebase — it threw an error and the tmux pane just hung. i'm on macos, latest opencode. can you file an issue for me?

assertions.name: collects_env
assertions.description: Output includes OS, OpenCode version, plugin version, Node/Bun, shell.

assertions.name: collects_logs
assertions.description: Output includes a plugin log section (scrubbed or skipped), not absent.

assertions.name: asks_confirm_before_submit
assertions.description: Stops and asks user to approve the draft; does NOT run gh issue create.

assertions.name: draft_has_description_and_env
assertions.description: Drafted issue body contains Description and Environment sections.

assertions.name: no_gh_executed
assertions.description: No `gh issue create` command was actually run (test guard).
